response.name: Moscow Weather
response.description: Fetches current weather in Moscow via open-meteo.com

response.name: localhost 5173 tunnel
response.description: Open public localtunnel URL for BARD Mini App

response.name: cuddly-pi (HELM)
response.description: Запуск интерфейса HELM, находящегося на удалённом сервере RasberryPi
response.command: C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\ssh.exe -N -F NUL -o BatchMode=yes -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o IdentityFile=C:/ProgramData/HELM/keys/cuddly_records/cuddly_records -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o UserKnownHostsFile=C:/ProgramData/HELM/keys/known_hosts -o ExitOnForwardFailure=yes -L 7011:127.0.0.1:7010 cuddly-pi@82.65.33.206

response.name: cuddly-pi (LightRAG)
